incident.why: Two vehicles, a white commercial van and a yellow passenger car, are involved in a collision near the median barrier. The yellow car is partially off the roadway, against the barrier, with the white van stopped next to it, partially in the lane.
incident.actual_accident_verification_note: Both the unannotated image and video clip confirm a true accident. Image note: A white van and a yellow car are positioned on the side of the highway, with the yellow car partially off the road and against the median barrier. The front right of the white van appears to be in contact with the rear left of the yellow car, suggesting a collision. The abnormal position and apparent contact of the vehicles indicate an accident. Video note: A yellow car swerves off the road into the median, colliding with the barrier/dirt and coming to a stop. A white van is also stopped nearby in the left lane.

hazards.notes: No fire or smoke is visible. Minor localized debris is present near the vehicles.

lane_impact.lane_impact_notes: The white van is partially in the rightmost lane next to the median. The yellow car is off the roadway against the median barrier, impacting the shoulder.

location_in_view.location_statement: An incident involving two vehicles is located near the median barrier, partially impacting the rightmost lane of traffic and the median shoulder.

lane_blockage.evidence: The white van is partially intruding into one lane (rightmost lane next to the median).

vehicle_count.evidence: Two vehicles are involved: one white commercial van and one yellow passenger car.

vehicle_type.evidence: A commercial van is one of the involved vehicles, representing the highest risk type.

hazards.evidence: No fire, smoke, or large fluid spill is clearly visible.

vehicle_orientation.evidence: Both vehicles are upright, but the yellow car is angled against the median barrier, and the van is slightly angled.

damage_deformation.evidence: The front/side of the yellow car shows moderate crumpling.

debris_extent.evidence: Small, localized debris appears to be present immediately around the impact area of the yellow car.

image_verification.note: A white van and a yellow car are positioned on the side of the highway, with the yellow car partially off the road and against the median barrier. The front right of the white van appears to be in contact with the rear left of the yellow car, suggesting a collision. The abnormal position and apparent contact of the vehicles indicate an accident.

video_verification.note: A yellow car swerves off the road into the median, colliding with the barrier/dirt and coming to a stop. A white van is also stopped nearby in the left lane.
